question:
Will Suriname win on 2025-11-13?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 13, 2025
If Suriname wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: fifa.com

evidences.title: Line Movement: Sharp Money vs Public Bets
evidences.content: Key takeaways: Sharp money: Large, calculated bets placed early or late to exploit value, often shifting lines significantly. Public action: Smaller, emotion-driven bets placed closer to game time, favoring favorites and overs. Line movement: Discrepancies between bet % (tickets) and handle % (money) reveal sharp or public influence. Reverse line movement: Lines moving against public bets often indicate sharp action. Betting splits: A large gap between bet % and handle % signals sharp money. Understanding these dynamics helps bettors identify value and avoid common traps. ## How to Read Line Movement & Public Betting Percentage sbb-itb-f1e9869 ## What Is Sharp Money? [...] ## How Line Movement Shows Sharp and Public Influence Line movements in betting markets aren't random - they reflect the flow of money and betting activity. Understanding these shifts can help you identify whether casual public bettors or professional sharp bettors are driving the action. The trick lies in interpreting the numbers and timing. [...] Early line changes also provide valuable insights. Significant shifts within the first few hours after a line opens typically indicate that sharp bettors have ident...

evidences.title: USMNT camp opens after chaotic weekend: Folarin Balogun sent off, Tyler Adams injury clouds roster - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: AC Milan's American forward #11 Christian Pulisic (R) shoots the ball during the Italian Serie A football match between Parma and AC Milan at the San Siro Stadium in Parma, northern Italy, on November 8, 2025. (Photo by Piero CRUCIATTI / AFP) (Photo by PIERO CRUCIATTI/AFP via Getty Images) Midfield candidates Malik Tillman and Johnny Cardoso, as well as winger Alex Zendejas, were left off the roster because they were just getting back up to speed. Tillman entered at halftime for Bayer Leverkusen, the unused Cardoso returned to Atletico Madrid’s bench and Zendejas played one half for Club América. [...] Out since Oct. 25, winger Tim Weah was in uniform but didn’t play for Olympique Marseille. (Pochettino had excused him from camp.) Left back Antonee Robinson remains sidelined for Fulham with a knee injury, raising concerns about his availability leading to the World Cup. Midfielder Yunus Musah’s inactivity at Atalanta (39 minutes over five weeks, including none this weekend) undermines his hopes of rejoining the U.S. squad. evidences.title: How to Track Line Movement | Outlier - Smarter Sports Betting
evidences.content: ## How to Use Line Movement Charts Effectively Line movement charts visualize how odds shift throughout the day across different sportsbooks. By analyzing these charts, you can spot where sharp money is going and how the market is adjusting. Here’s how to interpret them: Lines moving down: When odds decrease (e.g., from +105 to -110), it means the sportsbook is lowering the payout because the probability of the outcome is increasing. This is often a sign of sharp money backing that side. Lines moving up: When odds increase (e.g., from +148 to +162), the sportsbook is offering more value on that side, usually trying to entice bets because they believe the chance of that outcome is lower. [...] Ideally, you want to place bets on sides where the line is moving down, indicating growing confidence from sharps or new information favoring that bet. Avoid bets where the line is drifting up, as this suggests the market is moving against you. This bet initially shows a solid 3.18% edge on FanDuel with odds at +160, compared to other sportsbooks offering lower payouts. At first glance, this looks like a great +EV opportunity. However, the line movement chart reveals that the odds have actu...

evidences.content: ## Real-Time Line Movement Tracking Monitor live odds changes across all major US sportsbooks. Our Sharp Sports Betting Data API tracks line movements in real-time, identifying when sharp money enters the market and causes significant line shifts. ## Sharp Money Indicators Access professional betting analytics including: Sharp vs. public betting percentages Reverse line movement detection Steam move notifications Consensus sharp picks Bet ticket count vs. money percentages ## Multi-Sport Coverage Complete coverage for: NFL, College Football NBA, College Basketball MLB Baseball NHL Hockey Soccer (MLS, EPL, Champions League) UFC/MMA Tennis, Golf ## Historical Data Access Query historical betting data for: Line movement archives Past game results with closing lines [...] What is a steam move and how is it detected? A steam move occurs when the betting line changes rapidly (usually 0.5-1+ points) across multiple sportsbooks within a short timeframe (typically 5-15 minutes). Our API detects steam moves by monitoring line changes across 50+ books and identifying coordinated movements that indicate large professional betting groups taking action. evidences.title: Reverse Line Movement Explained: Sharp Money Betting Guide | OddsIndex
evidences.content: ### What is reverse line movement in sports betting? Reverse line movement occurs when a betting line moves in the opposite direction from what public betting percentages would suggest. If 75% of bets are on Team A but the line moves to make Team A less favorable, that is reverse line movement. It typically indicates that sharp bettors or high-value accounts are betting on the less popular side. ### How do I find reverse line movement opportunities? To find RLM, track both betting percentages and line movement for games throughout the week. Look for games where one side has heavy public support (65% or more) but the line is moving against that side. Multiple websites publish betting percentages and line movement data that can help identify these situations. [...] ### Ignoring the Timing of Line Moves When a line moves matters as much as where it moves. A line that moves against public betting on Monday but settles back by Sunday might not represent sustained sharp conviction. Focus on where the line sits close to game time and the overall direction of movement. ### Not Accounting for News Line moves do not always indicate sharp action. Injury reports, weather changes, and other...

evidences.title: Sports Results & Historical Scores | Live & Past Matches
evidences.content: Taking a deeper look at the archived results for your preferred sports can reveal when teams or players have consistently overperformed, and where interesting betting opportunities might be able to be found. It’s helpful to see the historical odds alongside the final scores and results of any sporting competition, because it provides some added context to the outcome. By also measuring how individual teams or players have performed against the odds consistently can directly help your betting approach. The strategy of analysing historical odds and results is used extensively by sharp bettors and tipsters, with the addition of regularly watching matches to examine performance alongside those prices. [...] Every sport is measured differently, which you will be able to see in the historical betting odds for each when you analyse them. ### Football Football is a sport in particular where historical betting odds are regularly examined by sharp bettors and tipsters to find any value bets that they can. We provide a huge amount of football historical odds data, spanning back over a decade for certain leagues and competitions. These results are clearly broken down into countries and thei...

evidences.title: ‎Pikkit: Sports Betting Tracker App - App Store
evidences.content: Pikkit is a massive upgrade to all sports betting apps on the market. I have been using it for 3+ years and seen the major improvements amongst this time. Once they released Pikkit Pro, it was an easy decision to upgrade and there are so many features that make me a better bettor. Closing Line Value, Promo Center(Get notified when promos/free bets are going to expire), Scenario Analysis(If any bets are conflicting, it shows your potential payouts for each scenario), Custom Book Selection(Line shop only the books you have), Data Exports, Market Alerts(Get notified when a market opens or when a line moves to where you set it), and Pikkit Web. The Pikkit Discord is a direct line to the Pikkit team and they are eager and receptive to all ideas.
